description: Chart components render using recharts library
steps: Verify recharts is listed as a dependency in packages/web/package.json

description: StatCard and PrioritySection components support dashboard layout
steps: Verify StatCard component exists at packages/web/components/StatCard.tsx
Verify StatCard renders icon, value, label, and optional linkTo
Verify PrioritySection supports priority variants: in_progress, planned, completed
Verify PrioritySection supports defaultCollapsed prop for completed items
